gate_runs.detail: 4/6 modules audited and passed (contacts.ts, pairingAck.ts, unreadStore.ts, directMessageNotifications.ts — 13 real gaps found across them, all closed with new tests). contacts.tsx and InviteMemberModal.tsx were still running when the run was stopped by user request (2026-07-15) before completing. i18n.ts was correctly excluded (pure translation data, no logic to mutate).

Resumed 2026-07-15 and completed the 2 modules the interrupted run left: InviteMemberModal.tsx passed (49/49 covered mutants killed across its 5 exported pure fns; 0 real gaps, 0 tests needed; NoCoverage remainder is JSX render body, covered by e2e per project no-jsdom convention). contacts.tsx skipped (skip_reason: no behavior-bearing exports — only export is the default React component; behavioral core confirmContact lives in contacts.ts, audited today at 0.969). Combined with the prior run's 4 passing modules, all 6 touched files are now audited. i18n.ts correctly excluded (pure translation data).

Full gate (make test-e2e-all) run twice. Run 1 (epic as committed): 68/68 non-relay; relay 240 passed / 8 failed. Two failures were GENUINE epic regressions, proven by baseline worktree at 6ce9cfd where both pass: dm-pairing-multi-use (AC-PAIR-4) and dm-pairing-single-scan-mutual (AC-ADMIT-6) — both timed out on chat-input because the issuer now sees PendingConfirmationPrompt. Root cause: this epic deliberately supersedes contact-pairing-code's AC-ADMIT-6/AC-PAIR-4 (bearer-credential rationale; see spec.md Amendments 2026-07-15) and neither the spec nor validation noticed; the e2e gate had never run before the epic was committed. Both specs updated to drive the issuer's confirm step; assertions not weakened (reviewer confirmed diffs purely additive). Run 2 (final tree): 68/68 non-relay; relay 251 passed / 4 failed / 6 skipped, all 3 epic specs + both repaired specs green. Remaining 4 failures are NOT epic-attributable: dm-self-heal AC-29 fails identically at pre-epic baseline (pre-existing genuine failure), and groups-lazy-updates / groups-poll-after-leave / groups-profile-reactive are the known shared-relay contamination (the failing set shifts between runs — groups-contacts, groups-dm-reactions, groups-polls failed run 1 and passed run 2). Epic contributes zero e2e failures, down from 2.

Step 5.7 re-entry after the review-gate remediation changed production code. unreadStore.ts PASSED (score 0.81, 219 killed / 27 survived / 23 no-coverage; 3 real gaps found and closed with 3 property tests appended to unreadStore.test.ts — mutants #220/#221 L544, #231 L554, #117 L317 all now Killed; remaining 26 survivors individually sandbox-verified as equivalent or side-effect-only). SECURITY: the new !isPendingConfirmation filter in initDirectMessageCounts carries 5 mutants, ALL KILLED, including negation-removal and whole-filter removal — no mutant permits a leaked contact card to light the bell pre-confirmation. DirectMessageNotificationsWatcher.tsx PASSED (8 killed / 0 survived). PendingConfirmationPrompt.tsx PASSED (0 survived). BlockContactButton.tsx and contacts.tsx skipped (no behavior-bearing exports; repo has no jsdom by convention). Auditor flagged two Stryker/harness reliability issues: #36 while(true) reported Survived but actually hangs the suite (Stryker related-test filtering under-reported), and its own first harness run falsely reported 6/6 killed because the sandbox lacked pages/ — both corrected before the verdict.

Converge-first: Opus (resumable, rehydrated from ownership-ledger) x3 passes to fixpoint, then Codex cross-vendor. Pass 1 over commit d267530: 10 findings, 0 critical; 8 fixed by a gate-remediation architect. Pass 2 over the remediation diff: 5 findings, verdict 'substantially clean'; 4 fixed, 1 deferred (reconcileFloor seed ordering — unreachable, mechanism recorded, trigger surface removed by the Block-button lockout fix). Pass 3: CONVERGED — 3 sev-3 doc/test-hygiene findings, all fixed. Codex: 1 P1 raised and rejected as a false positive with evidence (the flagged file runs 14/14 green; reviewer confirmed the mechanism — vitest's mock Proxy throws on property ACCESS, and the watcher only touches initDirectMessageCounts inside a useEffect that never runs without jsdom); its real latent version (total-replace mock leaving initDirectMessageCounts undefined) was fixed via a partial importOriginal mock. Privacy invariant CLEAR (pairingAck Steps 10-11 profile-announce is a NIP-59 gift wrap addressed to the recipient; no kind-0, no unaddressed publish). i18n CLEAR (all new keys en+de, typed in Copy).
